_note: Android tablet (7"/10") screenshots intentionally omitted: FWT is portrait by design on Android (ScreenOrientation locks PORTRAIT_UP except during an active workout), so tablet shots can only duplicate the phone layout. Play shows the phone screenshots to tablet users, which matches the real layout. Apple/iPad is unaffected (its store separates iPhone/iPad by device tab).
